title: AN ACT RENAMING FLORIDA ELEMENTARY SCHOOL SITUATED IN BARANGAY FLORIDA, BUTUAN CITY, INTO MARIANA L. PINEDA MEMORIAL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL

chunks.text:
H. No. 5657 / 103 OG No. 38, 5822 (Sept. 10, 2007)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9447, May 15, 2007 ]

AN ACT RENAMING FLORIDA ELEMENTARY SCHOOL SITUATED IN BARANGAY FLORIDA, BUTUAN CITY, INTO MARIANA L. PINEDA MEMORIAL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1.

Renaming of School.

â Florida Elementary School, a public elementary school situated in Barangay Florida, Butuan City, is hereby renamed and henceforth shall be known as Mariana L. Pineda Memoraial Elementary School.

SEC. 2.

Repealing Clause.

â All laws, decrees, executive orders and other administrative issuances and part thereof which are inconsistent with the provision of this Act are hereby modified or suspended accordingly.

SEC. 3.

Separability Clause.

â If any clause, provision, paragraph or part hereof shall be declared unconstitutional or invalid, it shall not affect the remaining provisions of this Act.

SEC. 4.

Effectivity.

â This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JOSE DE VENECIA JR.

(Sgd.) MANNY VILLAR

Speaker of the House of Representatives

President of the Senate

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on January 29, 2007 and February 19, 2007, respectively.

(Sgd.) ROBERTO P. NAZARENO

(Sgd.) OSCAR G. YABES

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Secretary of the Senate

Approved: MAY 15 2007

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL - ARROYO

President of the Philippines
